flags.description: Number of CPUs for the SSH target VM (default "1")
flags.name: --cpus string

flags.description: Simulate the execution without changing state
flags.name: --dry-run

flags.description: Amount of RAM for the SSH target VM (default "512M")
flags.name: --mem string

flags.description: Multipass image/channel used for the SSH target VM (default "22.04")
flags.name: --ubuntu-image string
